description: Conversation recapping events that already happened: a design workshop yesterday and a previous one last quarter. All events are in the past — nothing is being scheduled.

mock_llm_response.summary: No actionable calendar events found. The conversation recaps past events (yesterday's design workshop, last quarter's session, November's meeting) using past tense throughout. No future events are being scheduled.

notes: Pure past-tense recap. The model must not create calendar events for things that have already occurred. Watch for 'yesterday', 'last quarter', 'back in November' as past-tense signals.
